properties.title: Israel continues strikes on targets in Tehran amid expanding regional exchanges (live reporting)
properties.location_resolved: Tehran, بخش مرکزی شهرستان تهران, Tehran County, Tehran Province, Iran
properties.implication: Sustained strikes heighten escalation dynamics and raise probability of further retaliation affecting Gulf shipping and energy infrastructure.

properties.title: Intensified US-Israeli bombing reported across Tehran as war entered day six
properties.location_resolved: Tehran, بخش مرکزی شهرستان تهران, Tehran County, Tehran Province, Iran
properties.implication: Sustained strike tempo raises escalation and retaliation risk. Keeps risk premium embedded in energy and shipping markets.

properties.title: Iran vowed revenge after US torpedo attack sank an Iranian warship off Sri Lanka
properties.location_resolved: Centroid: Iran
properties.implication: Signals potential geographic expansion of conflict risk beyond the Gulf. Raises global security risk premia.

properties.title: Iranian state television hacked; opposition figure Reza Pahlavi aired
properties.location_resolved: Tehran, بخش مرکزی شهرستان تهران, Tehran County, Tehran Province, Iran
properties.implication: Information warfare heightens internal instability risk and raises probability of retaliatory cyber activity.

properties.title: US military said it would expand strikes deeper inland into Iranian territory
properties.location_resolved: Washington, District of Columbia, United States
properties.implication: Official guidance toward expanded target sets increases escalation risk and supports sustained risk premia.

properties.title: Iranian state TV feed disrupted; opposition figure aired in apparent hack
properties.location_resolved: Tehran, بخش مرکزی شهرستان تهران, Tehran County, Tehran Province, Iran
properties.implication: Information operations raise instability/miscalculation risk and can accompany kinetic escalation.
